overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through an industrial outskirts area at dusk. The camera moves through corridors of concrete walls and overhead pipes, passing graffiti-covered structures and abandoned vehicles, with a distant megastructure visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service road with overhead pipe bridges

agents.ego_description: driving straight through industrial corridor beneath large overhead pipe structures

entered.detail: large industrial pipe structure spanning across the road supported by metal trusses
concrete industrial warehouse with flat roof and small windows
white industrial structure with corrugated metal walls
tall futuristic corporate building visible on the horizon against the sunset sky
tall concrete barrier wall running alongside the road
smooth concrete wall with industrial piping attached

segments.scene_description: Driving straight through a narrow industrial corridor flanked by concrete walls and industrial buildings. Large overhead pipe bridges span the road, and a distant megastructure is visible on the horizon against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved industrial road with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: camera begins turning left around a bend in the industrial road

agents.ego_description: navigating a left curve in the industrial road, passing graffiti-covered concrete walls

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
thick black electrical cables suspended across the road

segments.scene_description: The road curves left, revealing extensive graffiti on the left wall while overhead power lines crisscross the sky. The overhead pipe bridges exit the frame as the industrial buildings recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial zone with solar panel arrays

events.description: exiting enclosed corridor into open industrial area with solar panel fields visible on both sides

agents.ego_description: driving straight toward a distant megastructure with solar panel arrays visible on both sides of the road

entered.detail: rows of solar panels or greenhouse glass structures extending into the distance
glass and metal framework structures reflecting the sunset light
large cylindrical storage tank with metal ladder
derelict truck or industrial vehicle parked on the roadside

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide industrial zone with extensive solar panel arrays lining both sides of the road. The distant megastructure dominates the horizon as the camera approaches an abandoned vehicle on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with abandoned trucks and overhead structures

events.description: turning right around abandoned truck and industrial debris
passing under large industrial overhead structure or gate

agents.ego_description: maneuvering around abandoned trucks and industrial equipment, approaching a large overhead industrial gate

entered.detail: rusted military-style truck with cargo bed parked on the right side
massive industrial gantry or gate structure spanning the road with metal framework
tall cylindrical silo with conical roof and external piping

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right around abandoned trucks and industrial debris, passing under a massive overhead industrial structure. The solar panel arrays exit the frame as the camera approaches the final industrial gate structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling wasteland of solar arrays and debris. It begins by driving straight through a narrow passage flanked by concrete walls and overhead pipe bridges, with a distant megastructure looming against the dusk sky. As the road curves left, the pipe bridges recede and the walls become covered in extensive graffiti under a web of crisscrossing power lines. The scene then expands into a wide industrial zone lined with vast solar panel arrays before turning right around abandoned trucks and scattered debris. Finally, the camera passes under a massive overhead structure, leaving the solar fields behind as it approaches a final industrial gate.
